---
pagetitle: Publications | FishMIP
description-meta: |
    Welcome to the Fisheries and Marine Ecosystem Model Intercomparison Project.
link-external-newwindow: true

listing: 
- id: journal-articles
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  fields: [title, date, author, subtitle]
  date-format: "YYYY"
  grid-columns: 3
  sort-ui: [title, date, author]

  contents: 
  # List peer-reviewed publications here
    - path: https://doi.org/10.1139/facets-2023-0024
      link-external: true
      title: "Applying ensemble ecosystem model projections to future-proof marine conservation planning in the Northwest Atlantic Ocean"
      subtitle: "FACETS"
      author: "Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Blanchard, J. L., Coll, M., Pontavice, H. D., Everett, J. D., Guiet, J., Heneghan, R. F., Maury, O., Novaglio, C., Palacios-Abrantes, J. ... & Lotze, H. K."
      date: "01-01-2023"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1029/2023EF004398
      link-external: true
      title: "The Past and Future of the Fisheries and Marine Ecosystem Model Intercomparison Project"
      subtitle: "Earth’s Future"
      author: "Novaglio, C., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Tittensor, D. P., Eddy, T. D., Lotze, H. K., Harrison, C. S., Heneghan, R. F., Maury, O., Ortega-Cisneros, K., Petrik, C. M. ... & Blanchard, J. L."
      date: "01-07-2024"
      
    - path: https://doi.org/10.1029/2023EF004402
      link-external: true
      title: "Detecting, Attributing, and Projecting Global Marine Ecosystem and Fisheries Change: FishMIP 2.0."
      subtitle: "Earth’s Future"
      author: "Blanchard, J. L., Novaglio, C., Maury, O., Harrison, C. S., Petrik, C. M., Fierro-Arcos, D., Ortega-Cisneros, K., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Eddy, T. D., Heneghan, R. ... & Tittensor, D. P."
      date: "31-10-2024"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1029/2024EF004868
      link-external: true
      title: "A Skill Assessment Framework for the Fisheries and Marine Ecosystem Model Intercomparison Project"
      subtitle: "Earth’s Future"
      author: "Rynne, N., Novaglio, C., Blanchard, J., Bianchi, D., Christensen, V., Coll, M., Guiet, J., Steenbeek, J., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Eddy, T. D., ... & Heneghan, R. F."
      date: "28-02-2025"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1029/2024EF005537
      link-external: true
      title: "Global and Regional Marine Ecosystem Models Reveal Key Uncertainties in Climate Change Projections"
      subtitle: "Earth’s Future"
      author: "Eddy, T. D., Heneghan, R. F., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Fulton, E. A., Harrison, C. S., Tittensor, D. P., Lotze, H. K., Ortega-Cisneros, K., Novaglio, C., Bianchi, D. ... & Blanchard, J. L."
      date: "06-01-2025"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-022-30991-4
      link-external: true
      title: "Potential impacts of climate change on agriculture and fisheries production in 72 tropical coastal communities"
      subtitle: "Nature Communications"
      author: "Cinner, J. E., Caldwell, I. R., Thiault, L., Ben, J., Blanchard, J. L., Coll, M., Diedrich, A., Eddy, T. D., Everett, J. D., Folberth, C. ... & Pollnac, R."
      date: "05-07-2022"
      
    - path: https://doi.org/10.1029/2022GB007367
      link-external: true
      title: "Assessment and Constraint of Mesozooplankton in CMIP6 Earth System Models"
      subtitle: "Global Biogeochemical Cycles"
      author: "Petrik, C. M., Luo, J. Y., Heneghan, R. F., Everett, J. D., Harrison, C. S., & Richardson, A. J."
      date: "02-11-2022"
      
    - path: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41558-021-01173-9
      link-external: true
      title: "Next-generation ensemble projections reveal higher climate risks for marine ecosystems"
      subtitle: "Nature Climate Change"
      author: "Tittensor, D. P., Novaglio, C., Harrison, C. S., Heneghan, R. F., Barrier, N., Bianchi, D., Bopp, L., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Britten, G. L., Büchner, M. ... &  Blanchard, J. L. "
      date: "21-10-2021"
    
    - path: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.pocean.2021.102659
      link-external: true
      title: "Disentangling diverse responses to climate change among global marine ecosystem models"
      subtitle: "Progress in Oceanography"
      author: "Heneghan, R. F., Galbraith, E., Blanchard, J. L., Harrison, C., Barrier, N., Bulman, C., Cheung, W., Coll, M., Eddy, T. D., Erauskin-Extramiana, M. ... & Tittensor, D. P."
      date: "01-11-2021"

    - path: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-020-15708-9
      link-external: true
      title: "Future ocean biomass losses may widen socioeconomic equity gaps"
      subtitle: "Nature Communications"
      author: "Boyce, D. G., Lotze, H. K., Tittensor, D. P., Carozza, D. A., & Worm, B."
      date: "06-05-2020"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1139/facets-2019-0035
      link-external: true
      title: "Differing marine animal biomass shifts under 21st century climate change between Canada’s three oceans"
      subtitle: "FACETS"
      author: "Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Prentice, F., Tittensor, D. P., Blanchard, J. L., Cheung, W. W. L., Christensen, V., Galbraith, E. D., Maury, O., & Lotze, H. K."
      date: "05-03-2020"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.3354/meps13438
      link-external: true
      title: "Climate-change impacts and fisheries management challenges in the North Atlantic Ocean"
      subtitle: "Marine Ecology Progress Series"
      author: "Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Boyce, D. G., Tittensor, D. P., Christensen, V., Bianchi, D., & Lotze, H. K."
      date: "27-08-2020"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.1900194116
      link-external: true
      title: "Global ensemble projections reveal trophic amplification of ocean biomass declines with climate change"
      subtitle: "Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences"
      author: "Lotze, H. K., Tittensor, D. P., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Eddy, T. D., Cheung, W. W. L., Galbraith, E. D., Barange, M., Barrier, N., Bianchi, D., Blanchard, J. L. ... & Worm, B."
      date: "25-06-2019"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1111/gcb.14512
      link-external: true
      title: "Twenty-first-century climate change impacts on marine animal biomass and ecosystem structure across ocean basins"
      subtitle: "Global Change Biology"
      author: "Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Tittensor, D. P., Blanchard, J. L., Cheung, W. W. L., Coll, M., Galbraith, E. D., Jennings, S., Maury, O., & Lotze, H. K."
      date: "16-10-2019"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-11-1421-2018
      link-external: true
      title: "A protocol for the intercomparison of marine fishery and ecosystem models: Fish-MIP v1.0"
      subtitle: "Geoscientific Model Development"
      author: "Tittensor, D. P., Eddy, T. D., Lotze, H. K., Galbraith, E. D., Cheung, W., Barange, M., Blanchard, J. L., Bopp, L., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Büchner, M. ... & Walker, N. D."
      date: "13-04-2018"

    - path: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-017-0258-8
      link-external: true
      title: "Linked sustainability challenges and trade-offs among fisheries, aquaculture and agriculture"
      subtitle: "Nature Ecology & Evolution"
      author: "Blanchard, J. L., Watson, R. A., Fulton, E. A., Cottrell, R. S., Nash, K. L., Bryndum-Buchholz, A., Büchner, M., Carozza, D. A., Cheung, W. W. L., Elliott, J. ... & Jennings, S."
      date: "01-09-2017"

- id: policy-docs
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  fields: [title, date, author, subtitle]
  date-format: "YYYY"
  grid-columns: 3
  sort-ui: [title, date, author]
  
  # List policy docs here
  contents: 
    - path: https://doi.org/10.1017/9781009325844
      link-external: true
      title: "Climate Change 2022: Impacts, Adaptation, and Vulnerability"
      subtitle: "Contribution of Working Group II to the Sixth Assessment Report of the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC)"
      author: "H.-O. Pörtner, D.C. Roberts, M. Tignor, E.S. Poloczanska, K. Mintenbeck, A. Alegría, M. Craig, S. Langsdorf, S. Löschke, V. Möller, A. Okem, B. Rama (eds.)"
      date: "01-01-2022"

    - path: https://www.ipcc.ch/srocc/home
      link-external: true
      title: "IPCC Special Report on the Ocean and Cryosphere in a Changing Climate"
      subtitle: "Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC)"
      author: "Pörtner, H. O., Roberts, D. C., Masson-Delmotte, V., Zhai, P., Tignor, M., Poloczanska, E., Mintenbeck, K., Nicolai, M., Okem, A., Petzold, J., Rama, B., Weyer, N. (eds.)"
      date: "01-01-2019"
      
    - path: https://www.ipcc.ch/srccl
      link-external: true
      title: "Climate Change and Land: an IPCC special report on climate change, desertification, land degradation, sustainable land management, food security, and greenhouse gas fluxes in terrestrial ecosystems"
      subtitle: "Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC)"
      author: "P.R. Shukla, J. Skea, E. Calvo Buendia, V. Masson-Delmotte, H.-O. Pörtner, D. C. Roberts, P. Zhai, R. Slade, S. Connors, R. van Diemen, M. Ferrat, E. Haughey, S. Luz, S. Neogi, M. Pathak, J. Petzold, J. Portugal Pereira, P. Vyas, E. Huntley, K. Kissick, M. Belkacemi, J. Malley, (eds.)"
      date: "01-01-2019"
      
    - path: https://ipbes.net/global-assessment
      link-external: true
      title: "Global assessment report on biodiversity and ecosystem services of the Intergovernmental Science-Policy Platform on Biodiversity and Ecosystem Services"
      subtitle: "Intergovernmental Science-Policy Platform on Biodiversity and Ecosystem Services (IPBES)"
      author: "Díaz, S., Settele, J., Brondizio E.S., Ngo, H. T. , Guèze, M., Agard, J., Arneth, A., Balvanera, P., Brauman, K. A., Butchart, S. H. M., Chan, K. M. A., Garibaldi, L. A., Ichii, K., Liu, J., Subramanian, S. M., Midgley, G. F., Miloslavich, P., Molnár, Z., Obura, D., Pfaff, A., Polasky, S., Purvis, A., Razzaque, J., Reyers, B., Chowdhury, R. R., Shin, Y.-J., Visseren-Hamakers, I. J., Willis, K. J., Zayas, C. N. (eds.)"
      date: "01-01-2019"
---
